description_long: This house features a modern architectural design with clean lines and a mix of flat and gable roofs. The exterior is clad in light-colored siding, complemented by a dark, angular roof and wooden accents around the garage and entryway. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is surrounded by a wooden fence and mature trees, creating a sense of privacy and greenery. A two-car garage is attached to the left side, while a landscaped garden bed lines the front walkway. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back and partially open to a rooftop terrace.
description: A modern two-story house with a mix of flat and gable roofs, light siding, large windows, and a landscaped yard surrounded by trees and a wooden fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage, landscaped garden bed, and prominent gable roof.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the fenced backyard, upper story setback, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the flat-roofed section, large windows, and the length of the wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view with visible driveway, garage, and additional landscaping along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small overhang, adjacent landscaped bed, and no porch or columns.
